name: codex-blender
description: Local Codex plugin scaffold for controlling Blender through scripts and a localhost bridge.

interface.shortDescription: Control Blender locally from Codex with Python and JSON commands.
interface.longDescription: Codex Blender provides a local Blender add-on, bridge scripts, and Codex skill instructions for scene creation, asset import, material setup, rig inspection, animation, and rendering workflows.
defaultPrompt: Create a modern room scene in Blender.
Import this 3D model into Blender and fit it into the scene.
Inspect the rig bones in this Blender model and create a simple animation.
